headline: 8 Numbers That Should Concern Prudent Investors
summary: The S&P 500 and NASDAQ hit record highs on AI growth, yet a 4.5% PCE and a 41.06 Shiller PE suggest underlying economic fragility. Read why these 8 numbers matter now.
